label: annotation
body: A record can be unfinished and still useful when its uncertainty is labeled instead of hidden.
author: anonymous reader

label: field comment
body: The strongest anchor here is the reason for writing things down: memory is not an archive.
author: archive maintainer

label: reader note
body: The archive starts with a refusal: the work can be public without turning the author into the subject.
author: anonymous reader
excerpt: This archive is not a portfolio.

label: reader note
body: I really dont like this part
author: anonymous reader
